title: I Built 10 Schools Around The World
summary: MrBeast undertakes an ambitious project to build 10 schools across various global locations, addressing the dire need for education facilities among underprivileged children. The initiative goes beyond construction; it includes providing clean water, feeding students for five years, and ensuring safer environments that protect them from exploitation. The video highlights the transformation of dilapidated schools into modern educational spaces and the incorporation of essential amenities like kitchens and bathrooms. Furthermore, it emphasizes community development, showcasing how these efforts will benefit not just the students but the entire community for generations. MrBeast's commitment is also reflected in his partnership with foundations to enhance educational access and invest heavily in these projects.
key_points: Building 10 schools globally to address lack of access to education.
Incorporating facilities like water wells, kitchens, and safe classrooms.
Feeding students for five years and providing sustainable community support.
author: MrBeast
